description: Update Submittal Approver for the specified Submittal

parameters.name: send_emails
parameters.description: Designates whether or not emails will be sent (default false)

returned_date.description: The date the Submittal Approver responded to the Submittal

sent_date.description: The date the Submittal was sent to the Submittal Approver

days_to_respond.description: The number of days the Submittal Approver has to respond

submittal_response_id.description: The Submittal Response ID of the Submittal Approver

400.description: Invalid Submittal Response for the specified Submittal Approver

403.description: User does not have permission to update Submittal Approver

attachments_to_upload.description:
Submittal Approver's Attachments.
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments_t...

attachment_ids.description:
Submittal Approver's Attachment IDs.
The Attachments specified here will be saved as attachments through the request.

upload_ids.description: Uploads to attach to the response

sent_date.description: Parameter is only available to admins.

returned_date.description: Parameter is only available to admins.

forward_to.description: Params used only when forwarding for review. Designates who the new reviewer is and what their due date is

user_id.description: User ID of the new reviewer

due_date.description: Due Date of the new reviewer

associated_attachments.description:
Submital Approver's Attachments to be carried forward.
The Attachments specified here will be carried forward to the next person in the workflow.
